entries.definition:
The final ʾalif in لَكِنَّا، سَلاسِلاَ and قَوَارِيرَا is pronounced in Qur’anic
recitation as a short vowel and the words are thus rendered as لَكِنَّ،
سَلاسِل and قَوَارِير respectively 3 non-functional (following an earlier
system of orthography where the fatḥa replaced by the ʾalif,
this was retained later), as in (27:21) لأُعَذِّبَنَّهُ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لأَاذْبَحَنَّهُ I
shall punish him severely, or slay him.
entries.definition_english:
The final ʾalif in لَكِنَّا، سَلاسِلاَ and قَوَارِيرَا is pronounced in Qur’anic
recitation as a short vowel and the words are thus rendered as لَكِنَّ،
سَلاسِل and قَوَارِير respectively 3 non-functional (following an earlier
system of orthography where the fatḥa replaced by the ʾalif,
this was retained later), as in (27:21) لأُعَذِّبَنَّهُ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لأَاذْبَحَنَّهُ I
shall punish him severely, or slay him.

entries.definition:
ʾ–l–l lightening; sharpening; agitation; yearning; family ties;
pledge, covenant. Of this root, إِلّ ʾill occurs twice in the Qur’an.

إِلّ ʾill [n.] pact, relationship, tie (9:8) وَإِنْ يَظْهَرُوا عَلَيْكُمْ لاَ يَرْقُبُوا فِيكُمْ
إِلاًّ وَلاَ ذِمَّةً if they get the better of you, they will not observe
towards you any tie of kinship or treaty.

إِلاَّ ʾillā, particle occurring 657 times in the Qur’an and functioning
as: I an exceptive particle (حرف استثناء), ‘except …’, ‘save for …’
(2:249) فَشَرِبُوا مِنْهُ إِلاَّ قَلِيلاً مِّنْهُمْ but they all drank [deeply] from it,
except for a few II in the meaning of adjectival غير (q.v.)
‘different from’, ‘other than’ (21:22) لَوْ كَانَ فِيهِمَا آلِهَةٌ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ لَفَسَدَتَا if
there had been in them [the heavens and earth] deities other than
God, both the heavens and earth would be in ruins III in the
meaning of ‘but…’ (بل), (q.v.) (20:2–3) مَا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَى إِلاَّ
تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَنْ يَخْشَى it was not to distress you [Prophet] that We sent
down the Qur’an to you, but [We sent it] as a reminder for those
who stand in awe [of God].

اللاَّئِي ʾallāʾī (see الَّذِي ʾalladhī).

اللاَّت ʾallāt (see ل/و/ت l–w–t).

اللاَّتِي ʾallātī (see الَّذِي ʾalladhī).

الَّتِي ʾallatī (see الَّذِي ʾalladhī).

اللَّذَانِ ʾalladhāni (see الَّذِي ʾalladhī).

الَّذِي ʾalladhī, masc. sing. relative pronoun (اسم موصول للمفرد المذكر)
occurring 304 times in the Qur’an, who/he who; which/that which

39
